Login.title: Stay close to the next conversation, the next follow-up, and the deals already moving.
Login.subtitle: A focused bilingual CRM for daily sales work, fast interaction logging, and clear next actions across desktop and mobile.

secure.title: Protected workspace
secure.body: The CRM keeps auth, roles, and sensitive record access inside one controlled internal shell.

bilingual.title: English and Hebrew
bilingual.body: Core screens are built for bilingual teams with RTL-safe layout from the start.

mobile.title: Fast mobile flow
mobile.body: Quick actions and compact forms stay usable on iPhone-width screens during outreach work.

form.title: Sign in and keep the pipeline moving
form.subtitle: Use your work account to open the CRM shell, review today’s follow-ups, and log new activity without losing context.
form.hint: Demo review account: admin@crm.local with password shir.

Shell.title: Today’s sales cockpit
Shell.welcome: {fullName} is signed in as {role}. Work stays connected across companies, contacts, follow-ups, and recent outreach.
Shell.searchPlaceholder: Search companies, contacts, email, phone, or notes

Dashboard.title: What needs action now
Dashboard.subtitle: Start with the overdue queue, keep new activity moving, and use the dashboard as the daily operating view for the {role} role.

timeline.title: Latest interactions
timeline.empty: No interactions have been logged yet.

cards.roleBody: Navigation and quick actions still follow the current permission model while the UI layer becomes more operational.
cards.localeBody: English and Hebrew rendering stay part of the default screen design rather than a late QA fix.
cards.mobileBody: The dashboard keeps primary actions visible so follow-up work can continue on smaller screens.

AdminLists.title: Admin list foundation
AdminLists.subtitle: Admin users can now create categories, add values, edit bilingual labels, and toggle activation state without touching code.
AdminLists.restrictedBody: Only admin users should manage shared lookup values. Editors and viewers are intentionally blocked from this area.

errors.generic: Complete all required fields before submitting admin list changes.

createCategory.title: Create a category
createCategory.body: Add a reusable lookup group for Sprint 2 imports and Sprint 3 CRM forms.

batch.title: Limited structured bulk updates
batch.body: Apply one approved lookup value across a selected set of companies, tasks, or opportunities.

duplicates.title: Review and merge duplicates
duplicates.body: Inspect likely duplicate companies and contacts, then merge the redundant record into the primary one.

AdminBatch.title: Limited batch edit
AdminBatch.subtitle: Select the records to update, choose one allowed structured field, and apply the same value across the selected set.

messages.updated: Updated {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}}.

filters.queryPlaceholder: Search by name, notes, or related record

records.title: Choose the records to update
records.body: Tick the records that should receive the same structured value. Only the selected records are updated.
records.empty: No records matched the current filters.

action.title: Apply one structured value
action.body: Pick the field and value to apply, then confirm the bulk update before submitting.
action.confirm: I understand this updates every selected record.

AdminDuplicates.title: Duplicate cleanup
AdminDuplicates.subtitle: Review likely duplicate companies and contacts, then merge the redundant record into the primary one.

summary.title: Potential duplicate groups
summary.body: Only groups with more than one likely match are shown here. The primary record is the oldest record in each group.

actions.confirm: I understand this keeps the primary record and removes the duplicate.

AdminImports.title: Workbook import review
AdminImports.subtitle: Sprint 2 stages workbook data in controlled chunks, profiles the source structure, surfaces cleanup issues, and keeps the final commit behind admin review.

messages.committed: The selected batch was committed successfully.
messages.updated: The staged row was updated and revalidated.

upload.title: Start a staged import
upload.body: Choose an Excel or CSV file. The browser profiles and parses it first, then sends staged chunks to the server for validation.
upload.error: Choose a workbook file before starting the import.

review.empty: Select or create an import batch to inspect profile, issues, and commit readiness.
review.commitBody: The final commit stays blocked until blocking issues are resolved. Warnings require an explicit admin acknowledgment before commit.
review.allowWarnings: I reviewed the warnings and want to allow commit.
review.noIssues: No validation issues were generated for this batch.
review.unsaved: Unsaved staged review changes will be lost if you leave this page.

counts.total: {count, plural, one {# staged row} other {# staged rows}}

Companies.title: Companies
Companies.subtitle: Sprint 3 turns the CRM into a usable lead database with searchable, filterable company records and mobile-safe detail views.
Companies.empty: No companies matched the current filters.

errors.generic: The requested company action could not be completed.

CompanyForm.subtitle: Keep company records light, bilingual-ready, and grounded in the shared lookup values from Sprint 1.
CompanyForm.error: A company name is required before saving.

CompanyDetail.openTasksCount: {count, plural, one {# open follow-up} other {# open follow-ups}}
CompanyDetail.overdueTasksCount: {count, plural, one {# overdue follow-up} other {# overdue follow-ups}}
CompanyDetail.contactsEmpty: This company does not have related contacts yet.

Contacts.title: Contacts
Contacts.subtitle: Contacts now support optional company linking plus multiple emails and phones for realistic daily sales work.
Contacts.empty: No contacts matched the current filters.

errors.generic: The requested contact action could not be completed.

filters.query: Search name, company, email, phone, or notes

ContactForm.subtitle: Use one line per email or phone so the shared Sprint 3 form layer can preserve multiple communication methods cleanly.
ContactForm.error: A contact needs a name and at least one email or phone number.

ContactDetail.openTasksCount: {count, plural, one {# open follow-up} other {# open follow-ups}}
ContactDetail.overdueTasksCount: {count, plural, one {# overdue follow-up} other {# overdue follow-ups}}

Interactions.title: Interactions
Interactions.subtitle: Sprint 4 begins the daily activity layer with a searchable interaction history across companies and contacts.
Interactions.empty: No interactions matched the current filters.

filters.query: Search subject, summary, company, or contact

InteractionDetail.tasksEmpty: No follow-up tasks are linked to this interaction yet.

InteractionForm.subtitle: Keep interaction logging lightweight while preserving the company and contact context that drives follow-up work.
InteractionForm.quickAddSubtitle: Use the compact flow to log outreach fast, keep the right record context, and continue straight into a follow-up when needed.
InteractionForm.error: An interaction needs a date, type, subject, summary, and at least one linked company or contact.

Tasks.title: Follow-ups
Tasks.subtitle: The first follow-up queue shows overdue and upcoming work with direct links back to the related records.
Tasks.empty: No follow-ups matched the current filters.

Opportunities.title: Opportunities
Opportunities.subtitle: Track deal movement with stage, status, and next-close intent without leaving the core CRM workflow.
Opportunities.empty: No opportunities match the current filters.

errors.generic: Review the form inputs and try again.

OpportunityDetail.subtitle: Review the current deal state and keep the next close step visible for the team.

OpportunityForm.subtitle: Keep the company link required and use stage and status values from admin lists.
OpportunityForm.error: Opportunity validation failed. Review required fields and try again.

Reports.title: Reports
Reports.subtitle: Focused MVP reporting views built on the same database truth as the operational CRM screens.

leadsBySource.title: Leads by source
leadsBySource.body: Count current companies by their lead source lookup value.

meetings.title: Meetings by period
meetings.body: Review logged meeting interactions over time.

LeadsBySourceReport.title: Leads by source
LeadsBySourceReport.subtitle: Grouped counts of companies by their lead source value.

MeetingsReport.title: Meetings by period
MeetingsReport.subtitle: Meeting interactions grouped by month, with quick access to the most recent meeting logs.
MeetingsReport.empty: No meeting interactions are available yet.

TaskDetail.subtitle: Sprint 4 links next actions back to the exact record context they belong to.

TaskForm.subtitle: Keep next actions concrete, linked, and easy to complete from the same shared Sprint 4 task flow.
TaskForm.quickAddSubtitle: Use the compact flow to capture the next step immediately while keeping the linked record context intact.
TaskForm.error: A follow-up needs a due date, type, priority, status, and at least one linked company or contact.

Search.title: Global search
Search.subtitle: Search now covers the Sprint 3 company and contact surfaces from one entry point.
Search.placeholder: Search company name, contact name, email, phone, website, or notes
Search.empty: Start typing to search the CRM.

AccessDenied.title: This area is outside your current role
AccessDenied.body: Sprint 1 enforces role boundaries on the server. Viewer users are read-only, and editor users do not manage admin settings.
